# Read Device Information | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Enterprise Program API ](/documentation/enterpriseprogramapi)

- [ Read Device Information ](/documentation/EnterpriseProgramAPI/Read-Device-Information)

-  Read Device Information 

Web Service Endpoint# Read Device Information

## [URL](/documentation/EnterpriseProgramAPI/Read-Device-Information#url)



```
GET https://api.enterprise.developer.apple.com/v1/devices/{id}
```

## [Path Parameters](/documentation/EnterpriseProgramAPI/Read-Device-Information#path-parameters)

`id``string` (Required) ## [Query Parameters](/documentation/EnterpriseProgramAPI/Read-Device-Information#query-parameters)

`fields[devices]``[string]` Possible Values: `addedDate, deviceClass, model, name, platform, status, udid`## [Response Codes](/documentation/EnterpriseProgramAPI/Read-Device-Information#response-codes)

` 200 OK``[DeviceResponse`](/documentation/enterpriseprogramapi/deviceresponse)`OK` Content-Type: application/json ` 400 Bad Request``[ErrorResponse`](/documentation/enterpriseprogramapi/errorresponse)`Bad Request` Content-Type: application/json ` 401 Unauthorized``[ErrorResponse`](/documentation/enterpriseprogramapi/errorresponse)`Unauthorized` Content-Type: application/json ` 403 Forbidden``[ErrorResponse`](/documentation/enterpriseprogramapi/errorresponse)`Forbidden` Content-Type: application/json ` 404 Not Found``[ErrorResponse`](/documentation/enterpriseprogramapi/errorresponse)`Not Found` Content-Type: application/json ## [See Also](/documentation/EnterpriseProgramAPI/Read-Device-Information#see-also)

### [Getting Device Information](/documentation/EnterpriseProgramAPI/Read-Device-Information#Getting-Device-Information)

[`List Devices`](/documentation/enterpriseprogramapi/list-devices)Find and list devices registered to your team.
